rationale: Section 11.432 governs qualification procedures for manufactured homes as residence homesteads under Section 11.13. It contains no dollar thresholds and simply cross-references Section 11.13 for exemption entitlements, so raising the exemption amount does not conflict.
quote: The owner of land that qualifies as a residence homestead under this section is entitled to obtain the homestead exemptions provided by Section 11.13 and any other benefit granted under this title to the owner of a residence homestead
_note: No dollar amount or cap appears in §11.432; it incorporates §11.13 exemptions by reference without specifying amounts.
